title: Chosen by God and Responding to His Choosing
summary: “Ye have not chosen me, but I have chosen you, and ordained you, that ye should go and bring forth fruit, and that your fruit should remain: that whatsoever ye shall ask of the Father in my name, he may give it you.” (John15:16). Let these words sink into our souls:God has chosen us. What an amazing statement!If we had chosen the Lord Jesus, there is always the danger we may reject him in favor of other gods. However, the good news is that because he has chosen us, he will cleave to us and cause us to cleave to him. “But I have prayed for thee, that thy faith fail not: and when thou art converted, strengthen thy brethren”(Luke 22:32). Is there anything in the entire universe more powerful than the prayers of Jesus?Let us say together, “nothing”! Fear not! We have the power of the prayers of Jesus guiding us towards heaven. My intention in this message is to analyze the various reasons that people respond to the call of God, and let this reflection help us to appreciate God’s call on our lives.
